generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that strategic autonomy is making us less safe? By relying on ourselves, we're missing out on the collective security benefits of strong alliances. Our partners are investing in shared defense systems that work better than anything we could build alone. Why risk our safety for the sake of independence? #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
